common.no_task_selected_desc: Select a task to view its details and focus on what matters.
common.tafreegh_placeholder: I feel overwhelmed and I need to get things off my chest...
common.quietly_building: We are quietly building this feature to make it perfect for your sanctuary. Check back soon.
common.invalid_reset_link: Invalid reset link. Token is missing.
common.offline_message: You're offline. Some features may not work until you're back.

landing.hero_title: Sukoon: Your Digital Sanctuary for Productivity
landing.hero_subtitle: Restore your daily balance with an app that merges modern focus techniques with your values. A space designed to grow quietly.
landing.features_subtitle: Designed to give you peace and productivity at once, away from the constant noise.
landing.feature_pomodoro_desc: Deep focus sessions inspired by your own rhythm, helping you achieve tasks without burnout.
landing.feature_tasks_desc: Organize your workflow intuitively. Group tasks, set priorities with the Eisenhower Matrix, and maintain absolute clarity.
landing.feature_tafreegh_desc: A dedicated, distraction-free space to instantly unload your thoughts and return to a state of mental stillness.
landing.quote: "Productivity is not in constant running, but in the calmness that precedes creativity."

features_page.hero_subtitle: See what we've built to help you master your focus, and get a sneak peek at the tools we are building for the future.
features_page.feat_auth_desc: Secure login flow with HTTP-only cookies, refresh token rotation, and Google OAuth integration.
features_page.feat_grouping_desc: You can manage your tasks and add as many as you need, all presented in a professional way with a simple and comfortable design.
features_page.feat_pomodoro_desc: Built-in timer with customizable work and break intervals to keep you engaged in deep work.
features_page.feat_tagging_title: A space to clear your thoughts
features_page.feat_tagging_desc: A dedicated, distraction-free space to instantly offload your thoughts and return to a state of calm and mental stillness. It is intelligently organized and presents you with a verse from the Holy Quran.
features_page.feat_ai_desc: Machine learning algorithms that learn your habits to auto-suggest what to work on next.
features_page.feat_analytics_desc: Deep insights into your productivity trends, peak focus hours, and project completion rates.
features_page.feat_calendar_desc: Two-way synchronization block out focus time directly on your personal calendar.
features_page.feat_team_desc: Shared workspaces, delegated sub-tasks, and real-time activity feeds for small teams.
features_page.feat_upcoming: We will announce in this page the upcoming features to this app.

about_page.hero_subtitle: A passion project, designed for my personal use and as a platform for me to learn more and more about software engineering.
about_page.creator: Founder and Developer
about_page.journey_text: My name is Omar Mahmoud, a law student who loves programming and building applications. I am currently a full-stack developer and continue to learn in this exciting field.
about_page.problem_text: The problem was that as a user who completed many tasks on various task management apps, I was forced to pay for higher limits. Additionally, I couldn't find an app that combined task management with prayer times, which is how the idea was born.
about_page.birth_text: I designed it for my personal use, so you'll find three core features: project management, a Pomodoro timer, and 'Tafreegh' (Brain Dump) – a space to offload thoughts because I'm an overthinker, which is why I created this feature.

newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter to get early access to new features, productivity tips, and exclusive updates built for you.
newsletter.subscribed_desc: Keep an eye on your inbox for our latest news.
newsletter.privacy_note: Your privacy matters. We never share your email with third parties.
